code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut sum = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(text, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < n
    let tok = string.substring(text, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
